e35245","dweb:/ipfs/QmRaydGr8BTHs1kvaZfsNU69pKzUAGFrvABn1KiRSbE51y"]},"node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/introspection/IERC165.sol":{"keccak256":"0x4296879f55019b23e135000eb36896057e7101fb7fb859c5ef690cf14643757b","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://87b3541437c8c443ccd36795e56a338ed12855eec17f8da624511b8d1a7e14df","dweb:/ipfs/QmeJQCtZrQjtJLr6u7ZHWeH3pBnjtLWzvRrKViAi7UZqxL"]}},"version":1}

params.minOutputs: Array of minimum output amounts (same length as tokenAddresses)
params.tokenAddresses: Array of token addresses to swap

depositTax(address,uint256).details: Called by FRouterV3 and AgentTokenV3 during trades      Caller must have approved this contract to spend taxToken

params.amount: The amount of tax being deposited
params.tokenAddress: The address of the agent token

getRoleAdmin(bytes32).details: Returns the admin role that controls `role`. See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {_setRoleAdmin}.

grantRole(bytes32,address).details: Grants `role` to `account`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleGranted} event.

params.treasury_: The treasury address for protocol fees

registerToken(address,address,address).details: Called by BondingV5 during launch() to associate token with creator

params.creator: The creator address that will receive tax rewards
params.tba: The Token Bound Address for the agent
params.tokenAddress: The address of the agent token

renounceRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

revokeRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

params.bondingV5_: The address of the BondingV5 contract

swapForTokenAddress(address,uint256).details: Only backend can trigger swaps to ensure proper price verification.      Backend should verify conversion rate externally before calling.

params.minOutput: Minimum output amount (calculated by backend with proper price check)
params.tokenAddress: The address of the agent token to swap taxes for

updateCreator(address,address).details: Only current creator or admin can update

updateCreatorForSpecialLaunchAgents(addr.details: Called by backend for tokens that need creator updates:       Project60days tokens:        - After graduation: set creator = vaultAddress (60-day lock)        - After COMMIT: set creator = walletAddress (creator receives tax)       X_LAUNCH / ACP_SKILL tokens:        - Before launch: set creator = taxRecipient (partner address)

params.creator: The creator address that will receive tax rewards
params.tba: The Token Bound Address (usually same as dbVirtuals.walletAddress)
params.tokenAddress: The address of the agent token

depositTax(address,uint256).notice: Deposit tax for a specific token

getTokenRecipient(address).notice: Get the tax recipient for a token

getTokenTaxAmounts(address).notice: Get tax amounts for a token

registerToken(address,address,address).notice: Register a token with its tax recipient (creator and TBA)

swapForTokenAddress(address,uint256).notice: Backend-triggered swap for a specific token's accumulated tax

updateCreator(address,address).notice: Update the creator for a registered token
